Bash(sed -i '1778s/async function _checkPendingMpPlan\(email, planKey\)/async function _checkPendingMpPlan\(username, email, planKey\)/' EtiLibre.html)

Bash(sed -i "1780s|const res  = await fetch\(\\`/api/verify?email=\\${encodeURIComponent\(email\)}\\&planKey=\\${planKey}\\`\);|const params = new URLSearchParams\({ planKey }\); if \(username\) params.set\('username', username\); if \(email\) params.set\('email', email\); const res = await fetch\(\\`/api/verify?\\${params}\\`\);|" EtiLibre.html)
